instruction: Someone reversed the yellow star stamp on this user minus icon. Restore the original direction.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/user-minus.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M22 10.5h-6m-2.25-4.125a3.375 3.375 0 1 1-6.75 0 3.375 3.375 0 0 1 6.75 0ZM4 19.235v-.11a6.375 6.375 0 0 1 12.75 0v.109A12.318 12.318 0 0 1 10.374 21c-2.331 0-4.512-.645-6.374-1.766Z"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#fde047" points="20,16 18,22 12,22 17,26 15,32 20,28 25,32 23,26 28,22 22,22" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/user-minus.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M22 10.5h-6m-2.25-4.125a3.375 3.375 0 1 1-6.75 0 3.375 3.375 0 0 1 6.75 0ZM4 19.235v-.11a6.375 6.375 0 0 1 12.75 0v.109A12.318 12.318 0 0 1 10.374 21c-2.331 0-4.512-.645-6.374-1.766Z"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#fde047" points="20,16 22,22 28,22 23,26 25,32 20,28 15,32 17,26 12,22 18,22" />
</svg>
